name: tailortrip
description: Root dev-orchestration only — the frontend and backend are deployed as separate services (see netlify.toml / render.yaml) and each has its own package.json.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix backend
